Reserve a Table

Our Story

About Us

From Our Family
to Yours

This place grew out of years of cooking at home on Sunday mornings. The same recipes our family had been making forever. At some point people started asking if we'd ever open a restaurant, so we did, right here in Burleson.

Breakfast and lunch are the meals that set the tone for your day. We think they deserve more than something quick and forgettable. Every plate that comes out of our kitchen gets made properly, no cutting corners.

We buy from Texas farms as much as we can. The eggs, the bacon, the produce in season. Fresh ingredients make a real difference. Burleson has been good to us and we try to give that back every day we're open.

The Burleson Brunch House Family

What We Stand For

favorite

Made with Love

Everything gets made by hand every morning. No shortcuts, no mixes from a bag. Just real food cooked the right way.

eco

Locally Sourced

We work with Texas farmers to keep our ingredients fresh. Eggs, produce, meat. A lot of it comes from pretty close to home.

groups

Community First

Burleson is home to us. We show up for local events, support the schools, and love seeing familiar faces at the table.

Pull up a chair.

Come in and sit down whenever you're ready. Walk-ins are always welcome.

event_available Reserve a Table
Burleson Brunch House

Family-owned and right here in Burleson, Texas. Breakfast and lunch every day of the week.
